channel.title: Kaggle on Adventures in Data Science
channel.description: Recent content in Kaggle on Adventures in Data Science

item.title: Mental Health in Tech: Early EDA
item.description: ## Warning: Ignoring unknown parameters: binwidth, bins, pad As much fun as reading and online coursework is, at the end of the day, I need to start putting these skills to use. Data set’s like Iris or mtcars, while super fun for training, do not really hold the same place in my heart like data sets involving issues that I deal with at work. Enter Kaggle. I thought it was mostly about competitions.
